'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 9''' was the 9th issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]'', covering [[August]] and [[September]] [[1997]] and contained 66 pages.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*[[Second Trooper]]: [[John Hollis|I, Lobot]] {{C|by [[Jim Swallow]]}}
*[[Jawa's Corner|Jawas' Corner]]
*Role-playing Round-Up
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]
*Q&A

===Features===
*"[[Servants of the Dark Side]]" {{C|by [[Iain Lowson]]}}
*:<small>The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] instruments of terror police the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] with ruthless efficiency. But how much do we actually know about the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] dark forces?</small>
*"[[Can Anyone Tell Me What a Grand Moff Is?|Can anyone tell me what a 'Grand Moff' is?]]" {{C|by [[Tony Earnshaw]]}}
*:<small>A tribute to [[Peter Cushing]], the legendary actor whose superb portrayal of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin]] proved a highlight of Star Wars.</small>
*[[Anthony Daniels' Set Diary]]: Rocky Horror
*:<small>[[Anthony Daniels]]' memories of filming in [[Wikipedia:Tunisia|Tunisia]] take a psychedelic detour, via a lonely outcrop and some indiscreet donkeys.</small>
*"[[The Making of Star Wars|The Making of ''Star Wars'']]: The Sound and Fury" {{C|by [[Dan Abnett]]}}
*:<small>[[George Lucas]]' masterpiece, hailed for its unprecedented visual effects, was no less innovative for the way it sounded.</small>
*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|Star Wars 'Episode I']]
*:<small>Star Wars Magazine takes you inside Leavesden Studios for an exclusive look behind the scenes of 'Episode I' – and a glimpse of an old friend…</small>
*[[Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire Players Guide|''Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire'' Players Guide]] {{C|by [[Matt Yeo]]}}
*:<small>Following on from last issue's player's guide to [[Star Wars: Dark Forces|Dark Forces]], we present a solution to [[LucasArts]]' Rebel Assault II. [[Wikipedia:PlayStation|Playstation]] not included.</small>
*"[[Atari Wars: A Star Wars Video Game History|Game On]]" {{C|by Matt Yeo and [[David Kelsall]]}}
*:<small>We sent our gaming gurus into their attics to compile the ultimate guide to Star Wars video games. Time to dust off your [[Wikipedia:ZX Spectrum|ZX Spectrum]]…</small>
*"[[Shadow Stalker]]" Part 3
*:<small>On the planet [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]], [[Wrenga Jixton|Jix]] finds that assassinating Governor [[Lexhannen Torlock|Torlock]] isn't going to be as straightforward as he'd hoped. Especially when he's double-crossed…</small>
